title: Full 82-key settings.json coverage: schema-synced catalog + typed editors + searchable group layout

tests.summary: 456 passed, 2 skipped, 0 failed — whole suite minus the env-dependent live-gateway file. The slice added 29 specs: settings-catalog.test.ts (11 — the mechanical catalog↔vendored-schema sync gate: completeness both directions, nested field sets, enum/bounds/required/const/managedOnly/deprecated/docsUrl sync, permission-rule pattern byte-equality + prefix parse, hook event names, bundle-hygiene grep guard) + settings-validate.test.ts (18 — all 19 schema permission-rule examples pass, per-key structural validators for the 8 json-control keys, bounds, env keys, and the object-assembly round-trip core: unknown-subkey preservation, clear-to-unset, const injection, required, meaningful empty string). settings.test.ts gained the editorMode/autoScrollEnabled demotion spec and the whole-object-sandbox-patch sibling-preservation spec; its BESPOKE fixture dropped autoMode (now an official schema key).

build.summary: all routes compiled; the vendored schema JSON stays out of the client bundle (value imports come from the pure settings-catalog module; a grep-guard spec enforces it)

e2e.summary: 30 passed, 3 skipped across ALL THREE viewport projects (desktop/tablet/mobile) — stricter than the prior waves' desktop-only gate. The 3 skips are the pre-existing unconditional armory-install.spec legacy skip. New S1b spec proves: search filter + match count, seeded rule rendered structured [Bash][git add:*], permission-rule add via tool select → polled on disk, sandbox.enabled object-form flip → polled on disk (flip-relative), enterprise collapsed + honesty banner + managed pill, hooks CRUD link href, unset round-trip (set language → unset → key gone from disk), still no save button, zero console errors. Fixed forward: the pre-existing C5 plugins spec consumed its seed and failed on tablet/mobile (never gated before) — now self-seeding.

by: vision pass over s1b-settings-{top,permissions,enterprise,search,narrow}.png vs s1b-ref-{vault,armory}.png at 1440px and 1000px
designAudit.notes: The surface speaks the shell's language: paper theme, serif display headings, crumbs, .text inputs, ghost buttons (Unset/Raw JSON/Add entry mirror Vault's reveal/+Add/Save), bordered uppercase mono pills (SET/MANAGED-ONLY/AUTO-MANAGED), banner.warn for the Enterprise honesty copy, sage-accented sticky group nav matching the sidebar's active-leaf idiom; <1100px stacks the nav into horizontal tabs. No emoji. Zero console errors while driving.

video.note: 9 beats (intro + 7 + outro), all vision-verified frame-by-frame, run NOT flagged, verifiedAt 2026-06-10T00:33:32Z. Films: 82-key overview, live search to 1 match, structured permission rows, rule add autosaved, nested sandbox.enabled object-form toggle, expanded Enterprise honesty banner, bespoke passthrough. Re-recorded once (retry 1): the first take's 'saved'-footer asserts sat under the caption HUD and debug reruns had left duplicate rule rows — asserts moved to visible result elements and the sandbox allow list reset.

notes: Resumed from a prior session's durable state (vendored schema + meta + refresh script, the 1240-line catalog, the sync-gate spec, settings.ts re-exports + suggestions feed were already in the tree); this session authored the validators, the 9 editor components, the panel rework (nav/search/enterprise/hooks-link layout), the settings CSS, the unit/e2e surgery, docs, and all gates. Found and fixed a latent S1 bug along the way: JSON.stringify drops undefined patch entries, so UI key-removal silently no-opped — deletions now travel as an explicit remove[] list in PUT /api/settings (back-compatible). Same-key concurrent-external-edit mitigation unchanged: drift banner + reload-before-edit; object-form editors document it. The hooks key stays read-only here by design (C4 CRUD owns it at /quarters/hooks).
